title: Seva Sadan
actors: M.S. Subbalakshmi, F.G. Natesa Iyer, Mrs. Jayalakshmi
plot: The film deals with prostitution and women's emancipation. It has a strong political thrust despite being a musical. The plot has strong feminist views. Sitalakshmi, a Brahmin widow, played 'herself' as Gundamma, a widow who goes ...
